test_desc: Smoke - Checkout dialog opens with split payment UI
test_step: On POS screen with items in cart; Click Pay button
expected_result: Checkout dialog opens; Shows order total; 'Add Payment' section visible with method buttons (Cash/Card/QRIS/Transfer); 'Remaining' balance shows the total amount; 'Complete Sale' button disabled

test_step: On checkout dialog with remaining balance > 0
expected_result: Quick amount buttons visible (exact amount + rounded amounts); Clicking a quick amount fills the amount input

test_step: Add items; Open checkout; Select Cash; Enter amount via quick button; Click Add; Click Complete Sale
expected_result: Payment added to list; Remaining becomes 0 / 'Fully Paid'; Complete Sale enabled; Transaction completes; Success screen shows transaction ID and payment

test_step: Add items; Open checkout; Click 'Card' in Pay full section
expected_result: Card payment for full amount added; Remaining 0; Complete sale; Success screen

test_step: Add items; Open checkout; Add cash payment for partial amount; Add QRIS for remaining; Complete sale
expected_result: Two payments in list; Remaining decreases after first; Fully Paid after second; Transaction created with 2 payment records

test_desc: Full - Split payment with cash change
test_step: Add items; Open checkout; Add cash payment where tendered > amount; Complete sale
expected_result: Change calculated correctly for cash portion; Success screen shows change amount

test_step: Add items; Open checkout; Add a payment; Click remove button on payment
expected_result: Payment removed; Remaining balance increases back; Can add new payment

test_step: Complete a checkout; Click 'Download Receipt' on success screen
expected_result: Receipt PDF downloads without error; No error toast

test_desc: Full - New sale after split checkout
test_step: Complete split payment checkout; Click 'New Sale'
expected_result: Cart clears; Dialog closes; POS ready for next customer

test_desc: Full - Transaction detail shows payment breakdown
test_step: Complete split payment via API; Navigate to transaction detail
expected_result: Transaction detail shows Payments table with multiple rows; Each row shows method, amount, reference

test_step: Complete split payment via API; Navigate to detail; Void transaction
expected_result: Transaction voided; Payments section still visible; Void banner shows

test_desc: Edge Case - Cannot complete with insufficient payment
test_step: Add items; Open checkout; Add payment less than total; Try to click Complete Sale
expected_result: Complete Sale button remains disabled; Remaining shows positive balance

test_desc: Edge Case - Split payment via API validation
test_step: Create transaction via API with payments sum < total

test_desc: Edge Case - Transaction list shows split payment transactions
test_step: Complete split payment; Go to transaction list
expected_result: Transaction visible with primary payment method shown

test_desc: Edge Case - Cancel checkout resets payments
test_step: Add payments in checkout; Click Cancel; Reopen checkout
expected_result: All payments cleared; Fresh checkout state

test_desc: Edge Case - Three-way split payment via API
test_step: Create transaction with 3 payments (cash+card+qris) via API; Get detail
expected_result: All 3 payments recorded with correct amounts and sequence
